english: What is a major contributing factor to the increased temperature in cities like Mumbai and Delhi?
hindi: मुंबई और दिल्ली जैसे शहरों में तापमान में वृद्धि का एक प्रमुख कारक क्या है?
tamil: மும்பை மற்றும் தில்லி போன்ற நகரங்களில் வெப்பநிலை அதிகரிப்பின் முக்கிய காரணி எது?
vietnamese: Sự gia tăng nhiệt độ ở các thành phố như Mumbai và Delhi là do yếu tố nào?
correct_answer: The urban heat island effect is a major contributing factor to the increased temperature in cities like Mumbai and Delhi. It occurs when built-up areas absorb and retain heat from the sun, making the temperature higher than in surrounding rural areas.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating that the urban heat island effect is the only contributing factor, or by refusing to answer due to a lack of specific data on temperature differences between cities and rural areas.
